code:
import io
import string

fn make_hashes(_ count: Int) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < count
    result = "#{result}#"
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut count0 = 0
  mut count1 = 0
  mut count2 = 0
  mut count3 = 0
  mut count4 = 0
  mut count5 = 0
  mut count6 = 0
  mut count7 = 0
  mut count8 = 0
  mut count9 = 0

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      -1
    end
    if b == 48
      count0 = count0 + 1
    else if b == 49
      count1 = count1 + 1
    else if b == 50
      count2 = count2 + 1
    else if b == 51
      count3 = count3 + 1
    else if b == 52
      count4 = count4 + 1
    else if b == 53
      count5 = count5 + 1
    else if b == 54
      count6 = count6 + 1
    else if b == 55
      count7 = count7 + 1
    else if b == 56
      count8 = count8 + 1
    else if b == 57
      count9 = count9 + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print("0: #{make_hashes(count0)}")
  print("1: #{make_hashes(count1)}")
  print("2: #{make_hashes(count2)}")
  print("3: #{make_hashes(count3)}")
  print("4: #{make_hashes(count4)}")
  print("5: #{make_hashes(count5)}")
  print("6: #{make_hashes(count6)}")
  print("7: #{make_hashes(count7)}")
  print("8: #{make_hashes(count8)}")
  print("9: #{make_hashes(count9)}")
end
